stemHtml: What could be the consequence if an aircraft with in-flight crew rest facilities (bunks) and an extended FDP is to be used for an upcoming flight, but has a technical issue and is replaced by another aircraft which has only reclining seats?

options.a: Crew can rest on cabin seats among the passengers.
options.b: Cockpit seats can always be used for rest but they are less comfortable.
options.c: The planned flight is compromised due to the lack of rest facilities.
options.d: Crew can request an additional rest period after landing.
